title: Writing and Representation in Sutton SignWriting
subtitle: Plane-based writing, authored space, perspective, and the conceptual place of SignWriting as writing
description: A series on SignWriting as writing: its use of space, script typology, authored viewpoint, iconicity, convention, legibility, handwriting, human authorship, machine encoding, kinematography, representational logic, and relationship to broader writing-systems questions.
